nasb.text: Your pomp and the music of your harps Have been brought down to Sheol; Maggots are spread out as your bed beneath you And worms are your covering.’

esv.text: Your pomp is brought down to Sheol, the sound of your harps; maggots are laid as a bed beneath you, and worms are your covers.

cnv.text: 你的威勢和你的琴瑟音樂， 都被帶下陰間了； 你下面鋪的是蟲， 上面蓋的是蛆。

ccb.text: 你的荣耀和琴声一同落入阴间， 虫成了你的床铺， 蛆成了你的被子。

csbs.text: 你的威势和你琴瑟的乐声也被丢下阴间， 你下面铺的是蛆， 上面盖的是虫。
